description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, futuristic design with a bald, human-like head and a segmented, armored torso. Its arms are highly articulated, with visible mechanical joints, exposed wiring, and metallic plating, while the hands are detailed with individual fingers and colored accents. The robot's lower body is encased in a long, black, skirt-like structure with transparent side panels, revealing internal mechanical components and slender, metallic legs. The legs are reinforced with metallic armor and end in robust, articulated feet designed for stability. The back displays additional mechanical details, including exposed wiring and structural supports, emphasizing its advanced construction. The color palette includes white, black, red, gold, and metallic silver, giving the robot a high-tech, urban-ready appearance.
description: A futuristic humanoid robot with a bald head, armored torso, articulated arms, and a long, black, skirt-like lower body with visible mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's human-like face, armored chest, articulated arms, and the full length of the black skirt-like lower body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the layered arm and leg armor, and the transparent side panel of the skirt revealing internal components.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, exposed wiring, mechanical supports, and the structure of the skirt and legs from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg, as well as the transparent skirt panel and internal mechanisms.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, legs together and straight, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: Wearing a futuristic armored chest plate, segmented arm guards, and a long, black, skirt-like lower covering with transparent side panels; materials appear to be a mix of metal, plastic, and synthetic fabric.
attribute_facial_features: Bald, human-like face with defined eyes, nose, and mouth; no expressive elements or display screens visible, features are smooth and neutral.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible articulation points, including shoulder, elbow, wrist, hip, knee, and ankle joints; hands have articulated fingers, all joints appear to be rotary or hinge types, allowing a wide range of motion.
